Name: Personal Website
Description: A source-available portfolio site built as a practical ASP.NET Core workbench.
ContributionSummary: Designed and implemented the application architecture, data model, styling system, and deployment path.
Problem: I wanted a personal site that could present projects and writing without becoming a static brochure.
Solution: Build a data-driven ASP.NET Core MVC site with provider-selectable persistence, reusable assets, and structured project metadata.
Result: The site can grow from a portfolio into a small publishing and project showcase platform.
Tradeoffs: The model is more structured than a simple static site, but the structure keeps future content from becoming ad hoc.
